title: Task 32 Design Adjustment: `specgraph read-mcp-resource`
summary: Corrects the design for a new `read-mcp-resource` CLI subcommand after PR #923 removed stdio MCP transport in favor of HTTP-only.
notes: Not filename/path ADR convention (lives under docs/plans, no ADR-#### naming, no explicit Status field), but content is a set of numbered locked design Decisions (D1-D6) with rationale/consequences per decision, closer to ADR than a PRD/SPEC/plan. Classified as ADR on content signal strength; not marked locked since there is no explicit Accepted/Proposed status field to confirm.
